mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project ( name, latex_content, user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT project_id, name, latex_content, user_id, created_at, updated_at FROM project WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT project_id, name, latex_content, user_id, created_at, updated_at FROM project WHERE project_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM project WHERE project_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
